title: Table Colgroup
content:
### The `` Element The `` element lets you style entire columns at once. --- ### Basic Syntax ```html
Name Age City
Alice 25 Boston
``` --- ### The `span` Attribute Specifies how many columns the `` element applies to: ```html ``` --- ### What You Can Style on `` | Property | Supported | |----------|-----------| | `background` | Yes | | `width` | Yes | | `border` | Yes | | `visibility` | Yes | | Text properties | No | > To style text in a column, apply the style to `` or `` directly. --- ### Column Visibility ```html ``` --- ### Multiple Colgroups ```html
``` > **Use Case:** `` is great for quickly styling alternating column colors or setting consistent column widths without repeating styles on every ``.
codeExample:
First Name Last Name Email
Alice Smith alice@example.com
Bob Jones bob@example.com

quiz.question: What does <colgroup> allow you to do?
